search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20068` $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(packets_in)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval kilopackets = packets_in*2/1000 | `per_second_chart_not_divided(sum(kilopackets) by exp_ip_name,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20068` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(packets_in)` | eventstats sum(packets_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `devices_table(PacketsAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20068` $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$Device$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | eval snmps=exp_isnmp+","+exp_osnmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | `sampling(packets_in)` | eval kilopackets = packets_in/1000 | `per_second_chart_not_divided(sum(kilopackets) by snmps,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20068` | `sampling(packets_in)` | eventstats sum(packets_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$Device$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | `sampling(bytes_in)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip snmps _time nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval percOfUsage = round(TrafficSpeed/(snmp_speed*1000000)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsage PacketsAmount | eval pct = PacketsAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval percOfUsage = if(isnull(percOfUsage), "", tostring(percOfUsage)+"%") | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval snmps = exp_ip_name."/".snmp_name | table snmps "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine pct "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" TrafficLine | rename snmps as "Device/Interface" | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

`netflow_search_rule_20068` | `sampling(packets_in)` | eventstats sum(packets_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip Direction _time sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by exp_ip Direction sum_by_exp | eval pct = PacketsAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | eval TrafficSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed = TrafficSpeed/1000000 | eval Max = Max/1000000 | eval Min = Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, Max, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps, Min, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mbps, StDev, 2)` | table Direction "Max Mbps" "Min Mbps" "Standard Deviation Mbps" "Average Mbps" TrafficLine pct "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

`netflow_search_rule_20068` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(packets_in)` | eventstats sum(packets_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name = "$Device$" | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | `conversation(PacketsAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module â€ś10068: Top Packets Monitorâ€ť (syslogs with nfc_id=20068). This Module identifies hosts with the most packets. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO â€śNetwork Traffic and Devices Monitorâ€ť Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
